testcase.name: AppConfig > should have providers defined
AppRoutes > should be defined as an array
AppComponent > should create the app
AppComponent > should toggle sidebar
AppComponent > should handle successful shortening
AppComponent > should handle shortening error 409
AppComponent > should open analytics drawer
AppComponent > should close analytics drawer
AppComponent > should toggle sidebar expansion
AppComponent > should focus destination input
AppComponent > should copy to clipboard and show notification
AppComponent > should navigate between pages
AppComponent > should handle hovering over short links
AppComponent > should poll global clicks and health
AppComponent > should cleanup observer on destroy
AppComponent > should handle navigation edge cases
AppComponent > should handle analytics fetch error
AppComponent > should expose global WhoaApp hooks
AppComponent > should initialize viewport observer and handle changes
AnimatedCounterComponent > should animate from 0 to target value
AnimatedCounterComponent > should handle decreasing values
ApiService > should be created
ApiService > should create a short URL
ApiService > should handle error 500 when creating short URL
ApiService > should get analytics for a short code
ApiService > should get bulk analytics
ApiService > should get global clicks
ApiService > should get paged URLs
ApiService > should get paged URLs with cursor
ApiService > should handle error in getAnalytics
ApiService > should handle error in getBulkAnalytics
ApiService > should handle error in getPagedUrls
ApiService > should handle error in getGlobalClicks
ApiService > should check health raw correctly
ApiService > should handle error in checkHealthRaw
DbService > should be created
DbService > should add a URL correctly
DbService > should bulk add URLs correctly
DbService > should update analytics and add snapshot
DbService > should seed data if empty
testcase.system-out: Local development mode: Seeding IndexedDB with sample data...

testcase.name: DbService > should update existing URLs in bulkAddUrls
DbService > should return live urls
SyncService > should send lastServerTimestamp in subsequent requests
SyncService > should only update DB if clicks have changed
SyncService > should schedule sync jobs correctly
SyncService > should respect skipSync flag
SyncService > should handle empty viewport in performSync
SyncService > should handle no matching links in performSync
SyncService > should handle API error in performSync
SyncService > should handle generic error in performSync
